SITE_METADATA.TITLE: Swag Store - Your One-Stop Shop for Cool Swag
SITE_METADATA.DEFAULT_META_TITLE: Swag Store - Your One-Stop Shop for Cool Swag
SITE_METADATA.DESCRIPTION: Discover the coolest swag at our online store. From trendy apparel to unique accessories, we have everything you need to express your style. Shop now and elevate your swag game!

HOME_PAGE.HERO_TITLE: Wear the framework you ship with.
HOME_PAGE.HERO_SUBTITLE: Premium swag for developers who build with vercel. From tees to tech gear, represent the tools you love.

PDP.OUT_OF_STOCK: Sorry, this product is currently out of stock.

CART.META_DESCRIPTION: Review the items in your shopping cart, update quantities, and see your order total before checkout.
CART.TITLE: Your cart
CART.EMPTY_LEAD: Hoodies, tees, the bits that end up on your desk—add something you’ll be glad you shipped. We’ll still be here when you get back.
CART.TAX_NOTE: Tax is an estimate until checkout.

SEARCH_PAGE.META_DESCRIPTION: Browse and search the Swag Store catalog. Filter by category, find apparel and accessories, and discover developer swag.
SEARCH_PAGE.EMPTY_RESULTS_SEARCH: No products found for this search. Try different keywords or change the category filter.
